executives.name: John C. May
executives.background: John C. May is Chairman of the Board of Directors and Chief Executive Officer of Deere & Company. He is responsible for leading the company's efforts to provide advanced equipment and technology solutions for customers in the agriculture, construction, and forestry industries. May joined John Deere in 1997 and has held various leadership roles across the company.

executives.name: Joshua Jepsen
executives.background: Joshua Jepsen is Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. He is responsible for the company's financial functions, including accounting, treasury, tax, and investor relations. Jepsen joined John Deere in 1999 and has held positions in finance, manufacturing, and marketing.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Cory J. Reed
executives.background: Cory J. Reed is President, Production & Precision Ag. He is responsible for the company's global production and precision agriculture business. Reed joined John Deere in 1998 and has held various leadership roles in marketing and sales.

executives.name: Justin Rose
executives.background: Justin Rose is President, Construction & Forestry and Power Systems. He is responsible for the company's global construction and forestry business and its engine and drivetrain business. Rose joined John Deere in 2022 from Boston Consulting Group.

tenure_dates.title: President, Construction & Forestry and Power Systems

executives.name: Deanna M. Kovar
executives.background: Deanna M. Kovar is President, Agricultural, Turf & Orchard Solutions. She is responsible for the company's global small agriculture and turf business. Kovar joined John Deere in 2000 and has held various roles in sales, marketing, and product development.

board_of_directors.name: John C. May
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and CEO of Deere & Company.

board_of_directors.name: Leanne G. Caret
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President of The Boeing Company and President and CEO of Boeing Defense, Space & Security.

board_of_directors.name: Alan C. Heuberger
board_of_directors.background: Senior Investment Manager at Cascade Asset Management Company.

board_of_directors.name: Charles O. Holliday, Jr.
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman of Royal Dutch Shell plc and former Chairman and CEO of DuPont.

board_of_directors.name: Michael O. Johanns
board_of_directors.background: Former U.S. Senator and former U.S. Secretary of Agriculture.

board_of_directors.name: Clayton M. Jones
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Rockwell Collins, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Gregory R. Page
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Cargill, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Sherry M. Smith
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President and CFO of Supervalu Inc.
